title: limeum humifusum
intro: Limeum humifusum, also known as the earth-rooted or earth-loving limeum, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Linderniaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Limeum humifusum is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Limeum humifusum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
